goal: ensures x * (y + z) == x * y + x * z
ensures if x >= 0 then x >= 0 else -x >= 0
requires b > 0; ensures a == b * (a / b) + (a % b)
tactic_proof:
lemma DivModIdentity(a: int, b: int)
  requires b > 0
  ensures a == b * (a / b) + (a % b)
{}

goal: requires b > 0; ensures 0 <= a % b < b
tactic_proof:
lemma ModBounds(a: int, b: int)
  requires b > 0
  ensures 0 <= a % b < b
{}

goal: requires a > 0 || b > 0; ensures Gcd(a, b) > 0; ensures a % Gcd(a, b) == 0; ensures b % Gcd(a, b) == 0; decreases a + b
tactic_proof:
lemma GcdDivides(a: nat, b: nat)
  requires a > 0 || b > 0
  ensures Gcd(a, b) > 0
  ensures a % Gcd(a, b) == 0
  ensures b % Gcd(a, b) == 0
  decreases a + b
{}

lemma SeqReverseReverse<T>(s: seq<T>)
  ensures Reverse(Reverse(s)) == s
  decreases |s|
{}

lemma SeqReverseLength<T>(s: seq<T>)
  ensures |Reverse(s)| == |s|
  decreases |s|
{}

lemma SeqMapLength<T, U>(f: T -> U, s: seq<T>)
  ensures |Map(f, s)| == |s|
  decreases |s|
{}

lemma SeqFilterSubseq<T>(P: T -> bool, s: seq<T>)
  ensures |Filter(P, s)| <= |s|
  decreases |s|
{}

goal: ensures x in s1 + s2 <==> x in s1 || x in s2

tactic_proof:
lemma SeqFlattenLength<T>(ss: seq<seq<T>>)
  ensures |Flatten(ss)| == Sum(Map(s => |s|, ss))
  decreases |ss|
{}

goal: requires 0 <= i <= |s|; ensures s[..i] + s[i..] == s
tactic_proof:
lemma SeqTakeDropIdentity<T>(s: seq<T>, i: nat)
  requires 0 <= i <= |s|
  ensures s[..i] + s[i..] == s
{}

goal: requires s1 <= s2 && s2 <= s3; ensures s1 <= s3
tactic_proof:
lemma SetSubsetTrans<T>(s1: set<T>, s2: set<T>, s3: set<T>)
  requires s1 <= s2 && s2 <= s3
  ensures s1 <= s3
{}

goal: requires s1 <= u && s2 <= u; ensures u - (s1 * s2) == (u - s1) + (u - s2)
tactic_proof:
lemma SetDeMorgan<T>(s1: set<T>, s2: set<T>, u: set<T>)
  requires s1 <= u && s2 <= u
  ensures u - (s1 * s2) == (u - s1) + (u - s2)
{}

goal: requires Sorted(a, 0, a.Length); ensures 0 <= index < a.Length ==> a[index] == key; ensures index < 0 ==> forall i :: 0 <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] != key
tactic_proof:
method BinarySearch(a: array<int>, key: int) returns (index: int)
  requires Sorted(a, 0, a.Length)
  ensures 0 <= index < a.Length ==> a[index] == key
  ensures index < 0 ==> forall i :: 0 <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] != key
{}

goal: modifies a; ensures Sorted(a, 0, a.Length); ensures multiset(a[..]) == multiset(old(a[..]))
tactic_proof:
method InsertionSort(a: array<int>)
  modifies a
  ensures Sorted(a, 0, a.Length)
  ensures multiset(a[..]) == multiset(old(a[..]))
{}

goal: modifies a; ensures Sorted(a, 0, a.Length); ensures multiset(a[..]) == multiset(old(a[..]))
tactic_proof:
method SelectionSort(a: array<int>)
  modifies a
  ensures Sorted(a, 0, a.Length)
  ensures multiset(a[..]) == multiset(old(a[..]))
{}

goal: requires Sorted(a, 0, a.Length) && Sorted(b, 0, b.Length); ensures Sorted(c, 0, c.Length); ensures c.Length == a.Length + b.Length; ensures multiset(c[..]) == multiset(a[..]) + multiset(b[..])
tactic_proof:
method MergeSorted(a: array<int>, b: array<int>) returns (c: array<int>)
  requires Sorted(a, 0, a.Length) && Sorted(b, 0, b.Length)
  ensures Sorted(c, 0, c.Length)
  ensures c.Length == a.Length + b.Length
  ensures multiset(c[..]) == multiset(a[..]) + multiset(b[..])
{}

goal: requires 0 <= lo <= hi <= a.Length; modifies a; ensures Sorted(a, lo, hi); ensures multiset(a[lo..hi]) == multiset(old(a[lo..hi])); ensures forall i :: 0 <= i < lo || hi <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] == old(a[i]); decreases hi - lo
tactic_proof:
method QuickSort(a: array<int>, lo: int, hi: int)
  requires 0 <= lo <= hi <= a.Length
  modifies a
  ensures Sorted(a, lo, hi)
  ensures multiset(a[lo..hi]) == multiset(old(a[lo..hi]))
  ensures forall i :: 0 <= i < lo || hi <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] == old(a[i])
  decreases hi - lo
{}

goal: requires forall i :: 0 <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] == 0 || a[i] == 1 || a[i] == 2; modifies a; ensures Sorted(a, 0, a.Length); ensures multiset(a[..]) == multiset(old(a[..]))
tactic_proof:
method DutchFlag(a: array<int>)
  requires forall i :: 0 <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] == 0 || a[i] == 1 || a[i] == 2
  modifies a
  ensures Sorted(a, 0, a.Length)
  ensures multiset(a[..]) == multiset(old(a[..]))
{}

goal: requires ValidList(head); ensures ValidList(newHead); ensures Content(newHead) == Content(head) + {val}
requires BST(t); ensures BST(newT); ensures Content(newT) == Content(t) + {val}
requires BST(t); ensures found == (val in Content(t))
tactic_proof:
method BSTSearch(t: Tree, val: int) returns (found: bool)
  requires BST(t)
  ensures found == (val in Content(t))
{}

goal: requires Valid(q); ensures Valid(q'); ensures Elements(q') == Elements(q) + [val]
tactic_proof:
method Enqueue(q: Queue<int>, val: int) returns (q': Queue<int>)
  requires Valid(q)
  ensures Valid(q')
  ensures Elements(q') == Elements(q) + [val]
{}

goal: requires Valid(s); ensures Valid(s'); ensures Elements(s') == [val] + Elements(s)
tactic_proof:
method Push(s: Stack<int>, val: int) returns (s': Stack<int>)
  requires Valid(s)
  ensures Valid(s')
  ensures Elements(s') == [val] + Elements(s)
{}

goal: requires IsHeap(h, size) && size < h.Length; modifies h; ensures IsHeap(h, newSize); ensures newSize == size + 1; ensures multiset(h[..newSize]) == multiset(old(h[..size])) + multiset{val}
tactic_proof:
method HeapInsert(h: array<int>, size: nat, val: int) returns (newSize: nat)
  requires IsHeap(h, size) && size < h.Length
  modifies h
  ensures IsHeap(h, newSize)
  ensures newSize == size + 1
  ensures multiset(h[..newSize]) == multiset(old(h[..size])) + multiset{val}
{}

goal: requires n >= 0; ensures n > 100 ==> McCarthy91(n) == n - 10; ensures n <= 100 ==> McCarthy91(n) == 91; decreases 101 - n
